pr.title: feat(demo-toolkit): Add automated demo recording pipeline
pr.author: vertz-dev-dx

testBeforeImpl.evidence: First commit claims 'Full test coverage with TDD approach' but commit history suggests batch implementation. Only types.test.ts visible in diff (+13 lines).

redGreenCycle.evidence: No evidence of red-green cycles in commit history. Large feature implemented in single commits.

oneTestAtATime.evidence: Cannot verify incremental test development from diff.

qualityGatesBeforeCommit.evidence: Commit 6 (b2e689f): 'fix: Fix lint errors'. Commit 7 (cad9800): 'fix: add missing dependency'. Commit 8 (c98b51e): 'fix: Fix TypeScript errors'. Gates were NOT run before commits 1-5.

noTypeEscapes.evidence: No @ts-ignore or 'as any' found in diff. Uses proper @vertz/core exceptions.

atomicCommits.evidence: 8 commits total, but 3 are fix commits that should've been squashed or prevented. Not truly atomic.

changesetAdded.evidence: No changeset file in diff. Command: 'git show 7f006e8 --name-only | grep .changeset' returned no results. packages/demo-toolkit/package.json and packages/ui-server/package.json modified (added @vertz/core dependency) but no changeset created.

botScriptsUsed.evidence: Commits authored by vertz-dev-dx[bot] and vertz-dev-core[bot]. Bot scripts appear to be used correctly.

noPushToMain.evidence: PR workflow used, not direct push to main.

scopeCompliance.evidence: PR includes unrelated workspace files: HEARTBEAT.md, IDENTITY.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, USER.md. These are OpenClaw agent configs, not demo-toolkit features. RULES.md: 'Scope creep is the #1 agent failure mode.'

noGitArtifacts.evidence: Binary MP3 files committed: narration-6.mp3, narration-7.mp3, narration-8.mp3. Test artifacts should not be in git.

readTicketFirst.evidence: No ticket found in /workspace/vertz/tickets/. PR is exploratory ('Part of Demo Squad exploration').

readRules.evidence: Cannot verify from commit history. Assumed agent read RULES.md.

scopeCompliance.evidence: Workspace config files (HEARTBEAT.md, etc.) included in PR scope. Clear scope violation.

deviationsEscalated.evidence: PR references 'plans/explorations/demo-squad/README.md' which does not exist. If exploratory work, should be documented or escalated.

designDocExists.evidence: Referenced design doc does not exist: /workspace/vertz/plans/explorations/demo-squad/README.md

developerWalkthrough.evidence: No formal ticket with Developer Walkthrough section. PR provides examples but no structured walkthrough.

userOutcomeTests.evidence: PR includes working demo script (scripts/task-manager.ts) that demonstrates end-to-end usage.

publicApiOnly.evidence: Examples use exported APIs from @vertz/demo-toolkit. No internal imports visible.

verticalSlice.evidence: Feature is end-to-end: recorder + script-runner + TTS + FFmpeg muxing. Fully usable.

documentation.evidence: Excellent documentation: README.md, NARRATION.md, STORYBOARD.md. Clear usage examples.

noEval.evidence: No eval() or new Function() in code.

noHardcodedSecrets.evidence: No hardcoded secrets found in diff.

inputSanitization.evidence: Shell commands properly escape input: text.replace(/"/g, '\"'). Paths quoted in FFmpeg commands.

violations.evidence: packages/demo-toolkit/package.json and packages/ui-server/package.json both added dependency '@vertz/core': 'workspace:*', but no changeset file found in commit 7f006e8.
violations.recommendation: Run 'bunx changeset' and select affected packages (demo-toolkit, ui-server). Add changeset commit before merging.

violations.description: Quality gates bypassed - fix commits after implementation
violations.evidence: Commit 6 (b2e689f): 'fix: Fix lint errors'. Commit 7 (cad9800): 'fix: add missing dependency'. Commit 8 (c98b51e): 'fix: Fix TypeScript errors in recorder and tts'. These errors should have been caught BEFORE commits 1-5 if quality gates were run.
violations.recommendation: ALWAYS run 'bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run lint' before EVERY commit. Consider adding git pre-commit hooks to enforce.

violations.description: Scope creep - unrelated workspace files included
violations.evidence: PR includes HEARTBEAT.md, IDENTITY.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, USER.md — OpenClaw agent configuration files unrelated to demo-toolkit feature.
violations.recommendation: Move workspace configuration files to a separate PR. Keep feature PRs focused. Review 'git diff --cached' before committing to catch scope violations.

violations.description: Referenced design document does not exist
violations.evidence: PR body mentions 'Demo Squad brief: plans/explorations/demo-squad/README.md' but file does not exist at that path.
violations.recommendation: Create the referenced design doc retroactively, or update PR description to remove the reference. Exploratory work should be documented.

violations.description: Binary test artifacts committed to git
violations.recommendation: Add '*.mp3' and '*.webm' to .gitignore under packages/demo-toolkit/demos/. Use Git LFS if demo videos need to be tracked.

summary: PR #263 adds valuable demo recording functionality with TTS narration, but the implementation process violated multiple critical rules: no changeset for package changes, quality gates bypassed (fix commits after implementation), scope creep with unrelated workspace files, and missing design documentation. The feature is functional and well-documented, but the process discipline was poor. Grade: D — Multiple major violations.
